name: Reusing a Nonce, Key Pair in Encryption
description: The product reuses a nonce or nonce-key pair in encryption operations. Nonces must be unique per operation; reuse enables replay attacks, allows attackers to derive plaintext from ciphertext, or permits impersonation by resending captured encrypted messages.
detection_pattern: Look for TRANSFORM nodes (encryption, authenticated encryption) that receive nonce values from STORAGE or META nodes (static nonce, reused counter) without a CONTROL mediator (nonce uniqueness enforcement, counter increment, random nonce generation) that guarantees each nonce is used only once per key.
